title: Gradient-Based Optimizers Path

steps.title: Langevin Dynamics
steps.summary: Langevin Dynamics belongs to the Evaluation Metrics area of AI/ML, within Gradient-Based Optimizers. It sits inside Evaluation Metrics / Gradient-Based Optimizers. Compare it with Histogram Matching and H-Statistic (Interaction Strength). It opens into Score Matching with Langevin Dynamics and Denoising Score Matching with Annealed Langevin Dynamics.
steps.whyIncluded: Start here to anchor the vocabulary and core intuition for this area.

steps.title: H-Statistic (Interaction Strength)

steps.whyIncluded: Use this after the foundations to connect patterns, variants, and system behavior.

steps.title: Histogram Matching
steps.summary: Histogram Matching belongs to the Evaluation Metrics area of AI/ML, within Gradient-Based Optimizers. It sits inside Evaluation Metrics / Gradient-Based Optimizers. Start after Matching Networks.
